issues: 1x silhouette too small — fluffy orb top merges into blob, loses magical identity
dark-bg edge softness on orb perimeter — outer sparkle pixels blend into background slightly
reasoning: Strong charm factor: round fluffy pink orb top with sparkle dots hits the toy/magical aesthetic well, colorful bead accents on handle add personality — passes the sticker test at 4x. Silhouette is instantly readable as a magic staff at 4x on both light and dark backgrounds, and the warm orange staff contrasts nicely with the pink head. On light bg the sprite sings. On dark bg the pink orb holds its own though the outermost edge pixels lose some definition. The critical weakness is 1x: the sprite is small enough that the fluffy top collapses into an indistinct blob — the distinctive round magical orb shape is lost, leaving just a vague staff outline. Charm is high, clarity at 4x is good, but 1x readability is the drag that keeps this marginal rather than a clear pass.
